hero.title: Beautiful proposals your clients will actually read
hero.subtitle: Show services, pricing, and deliverables with interactive quote pages. Replace PDFs with modern, shareable proposals.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Traditional quotes feel like a 2005 Word doc.
problem.description: Overwhelming documents, confusing timelines, and lost context. Clients struggle to understand proposals, and you lose the chance to wow them.

reasons.title: Present ideas visually
reasons.description: Show services, pricing, timelines, examples, and deliverables in a way clients can actually explore and understand.

reasons.title: Make proposals easier to navigate
reasons.description: Instead of overwhelming documents, organize information into clean visual sections that guide the client naturally through the proposal.

reasons.title: Create a stronger first impression
reasons.description: Every proposal feels polished, modern, and professional from the very first click.

reasons.title: Share proposals with confidence
reasons.description: Send a simple link instead of large files or messy message threads. Every proposal is designed to look clean and presentable when shared.

features.label: Product
features.title: Everything you need to create stunning quotes
features.description: Powerful tools to build, customize, and share professional proposals.

features.title: Interactive components
features.description: Rich, visual building blocks for every part of your proposal

features.title: Custom branding
features.description: Match your brand colors, fonts, and logo on every page

features.title: Real-time preview
features.description: See exactly how your proposal looks as you build it

features.title: Share with a link
features.description: Send proposals instantly—no large files or email attachments

features.title: Analytics & tracking
features.description: Know when clients view, interact with, and engage with your proposals

features.title: Version control
features.description: Keep track of changes and maintain multiple proposal versions

cta.title: Ready to impress your clients?
cta.description: Start creating beautiful interactive quotes today.

footer.tagline: Interactive quote experiences for modern teams.
